channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Warns Fred Matiang'i Against Defecting to Ruto's Camp
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democratic Convention Party, has publicly cautioned Fred Matiang'i, a deputy leader in the Jubilee Party, against being intimidated by the Ruto administration's tactics...

item.title: PVL Match Recap: Zus Coffee Triumphs Over Choco Mucho in Batangas
item.description: The Premier Volleyball League (PVL) witnessed a decisive victory as Zus Coffee swept Choco Mucho during their match held in Batangas on July 11, 2026. This result underscores the team's strong perform...

item.title: Trump Administration Subpoenas New York Times Reporters Over Coverage of Qatari Aircraft
item.description: The Trump administration faced widespread criticism after reports emerged that it had subpoenaed four New York Times journalists who covered security concerns surrounding a Boeing 747 donated by Qatar...

item.title: Harry Kane shares experience of golfing with Donald Trump
item.description: England's soccer captain Harry Kane has shared details about his golf outing with former US President Donald Trump, describing the encounter as 'surreal'. The meeting took place in Palm Beach, Florida...

item.title: How audiobooks and graphic novels sparked a love of reading in my dyslexic children
item.description: Kylie Howarth, a children's author and illustrator from Western Australia, shares her journey of nurturing a love for reading in her dyslexic children. Despite growing up in a book-filled home, her yo...

item.title: Dangerous Work at Sea: Tuna Fisheries and the Risks for Observers
item.description: The article explores the perilous realities faced by fisheries observers in the Pacific tuna industry, where illegal fishing and corporate negligence have led to fatal incidents and disappearances. Ob...

item.title: Alberta experiences unusually high tornado activity this year due to favorable weather conditions
item.description: Alberta has seen an unprecedented increase in tornado activity this year, with at least 23 confirmed tornadoes as of July 11, 2026. This surpasses the annual average of 34 tornadoes across the prairie...

item.title: Government expands land formalisation drive in Misungwi to reduce disputes and strengthen land ownership
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has stepped up its land formalisation programme in Misungwi District, Mwanza Region, calling on wananchi to fully participate in land surveying and registration activities a...

item.title: US and Iran negotiate safe passage through Strait of Hormuz amid tensions
item.description: The article details ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran over secure shipping lanes through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil transit route. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqch...

item.title: England Faces Norway, Argentina Takes On Switzerland in World Cup Last Eight
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-finals have set the stage for intense battles as England confronts Norway and Argentina faces Switzerland. England's Harry Kane, the team's top scorer with six goals, w...

item.title: Dermot Murnaghan, TV presenter, passes away at 68 following stage four prostate cancer diagnosis
item.description: Dermot Murnaghan, a well-known British television presenter, has passed away at the age of 68. His death follows a year after he publicly disclosed his battle with stage four prostate cancer. A respec...

item.title: Gossy Ukanwoke's BetKing Cares leads community impact in Africa's gaming sector
item.description: Gossy Ukanwoke, managing director of KingMakers and CEO of BetKing, is changing how leadership is viewed in Africa's gaming industry by prioritizing social impact alongside profit. Through BetKing Car...

item.title: Pakistan's military intensifies counter-terrorism operations in Balochistan under Operation Shaban
item.description: Pakistan's security forces have intensified counter-terrorism operations in Balochistan under Operation Shaban, eliminating 95 terrorists since July 5. The latest action resulted in 16 more casualties...

item.title: Ananse graduates drive Africa's $31bn fashion economy
item.description: The article highlights how emerging designers from Ananse Centre for Design are transforming Africa's $31bn fashion industry. Founded by Samuel Mensah, the program trains creatives in technical skills...

item.title: Tanzania's Football Growth Attracts South African Talent and Investment
item.description: The Tanzania Premier League is undergoing a significant transformation as high-profile South African coaches and players increasingly relocate to East Africa. This shift highlights Tanzania's emerging...

item.title: West Bengal CM addresses controversy over Indrajit Mondal's death
item.description: The article discusses West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari's statement clarifying that Indrajit Mondal's death was a murder, not a lynching. This comes amid heightened political tension followi...

item.title: SK Hynix's Market Performance Following Initial Trading
item.description: The article analyzes SK Hynix's stock performance on its first day of trading following a significant merger with a major semiconductor company. Key points include the initial market reaction, analyst...

item.title: Tragic Boat Accident Claims Lives of 15 Indian Tourists Near Phú Quốc Island
item.description: Fifteen Indian tourists lost their lives in a tragic boat accident off the coast of Phú Quốc Island in Vietnam. The incident occurred on Saturday when a speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists, three cr...

item.title: Reflections on Vacation Souvenirs and Cultural Artifacts
item.description: The article explores the cultural significance of vacation souvenirs through the lens of Edith Pritchett's cartoon, critiquing consumerism and the commodification of travel experiences. It argues that...

item.title: Alberta's Economic Rise and Separatist Sentiments at the Calgary Stampede 2026
item.description: The Calgary Stampede 2026 has become a platform for Alberta to showcase its economic resurgence while grappling with separatist movements. Premier Danielle Smith emphasized Alberta's 'moment' as the p...
